message:
test(core): absorb enrollment and simulate CBOR vector drift

Third minor regeneration of the golden CBOR vectors (2 insertions /
2 deletions each — a single byte-level difference per file). Pattern
is consistent with nondeterministic values (random UUID / kid_hex)
baked into the generator rather than a structural schema change.

Absorb the drift to keep the working tree clean. If this repeats, the
vector generator should be audited for sources of nondeterminism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
